title: Introduction to Machine Learning
content_md:
# What Is Machine Learning?

Machine Learning allows computers to learn patterns from data and make predictions.

## Categories of ML
| Type | Purpose | Example |
|------|---------|---------|
| Supervised | Predict known outcome | Predict house prices |
| Unsupervised | Find hidden patterns | Customer segmentation |
| Reinforcement | Trial and error learning | Game AI |

ML is not magic. It is statistics, logic, and careful data work.

questions.question: What is the goal of Machine Learning?
questions.answer: To learn patterns from data and make predictions.

questions.question: What type of learning is trial-and-error based?
Is ML pure magic?
questions.answer: No, it is careful math and statistics.
